strategies.name: Declare War on Your Enemies (Polarity Strategy)
strategies.essence: Know exactly who threatens you. Unclear enemies create unclear responses.

strategies.name: Do Not Fight the Last War (Guerrilla-Mind Strategy)
strategies.essence: Past victories become future defeats. Adapt to present conditions.

strategies.name: Presence of Mind (Counterbalance Strategy)
strategies.essence: Detach emotionally from the chaos. Clarity requires distance.

strategies.name: Create a Sense of Urgency (Death-Ground Strategy)
strategies.essence: Burn the boats. When retreat is impossible, you fight with everything.

strategies.name: Avoid Groupthink (Command-and-Control Strategy)
strategies.essence: Committees produce compromise. One clear voice produces action.

strategies.name: Segment Your Forces (Controlled-Chaos Strategy)
strategies.essence: Small, autonomous units adapt faster than monolithic forces.

strategies.name: Transform Your War into a Crusade (Morale Strategy)
strategies.essence: Give people a cause worth fighting for. Mercenaries fight differently than believers.

strategies.name: Pick Your Battles Carefully (Perfect-Economy Strategy)
strategies.essence: Every battle costs resources. Only fight when the prize exceeds the price.

strategies.name: Turn the Tables (Counterattack Strategy)
strategies.essence: Let them attack first. Absorb the blow, then strike when they're extended.

strategies.name: Make Defense a Pleasure (Deterrence Strategy)
strategies.essence: Make attacking you so costly that they choose easier targets.

strategies.name: Lose Battles but Win the War (Grand Strategy)
strategies.essence: Sacrifice pieces for position. The endgame matters more than any single battle.

strategies.name: Know Your Enemy (Intelligence Strategy)
strategies.essence: Study their mind, not just their moves. Predict the person, predict the action.

strategies.name: Overwhelm with Speed (Blitzkrieg Strategy)
strategies.essence: Move faster than they can respond. Velocity creates its own momentum.

strategies.name: Control the Dynamic (Forcing Strategy)
strategies.essence: Dictate the tempo. When you choose when and where, you've already won.

strategies.name: Hit Them Where It Hurts (Center-of-Gravity Strategy)
strategies.essence: Find what they depend on. Strike the foundation, not the walls.

strategies.name: Defeat Them in Detail (Divide-and-Conquer Strategy)
strategies.essence: Never fight the whole. Isolate and destroy piece by piece.

strategies.name: Defeat from Within (Trojan Horse Strategy)
strategies.essence: The strongest walls fall from inside. Plant your influence before you need it.

strategies.name: Expose and Attack Soft Flank (Turning Strategy)
strategies.essence: Go around, not through. Find where they're not looking.

strategies.name: Envelop the Enemy (Annihilation Strategy)
strategies.essence: Cut off all options. When they can't retreat, they surrender or die.

strategies.name: Maneuver Them into Weakness (Ripening Strategy)
strategies.essence: Make them weaker before you strike. Patience is a weapon.

strategies.name: Negotiate While Advancing (Diplomatic-War Strategy)
strategies.essence: Talk peace while preparing war. Words buy time, actions win.

strategies.name: Know How to End Things (Exit Strategy)
strategies.essence: Enter with the exit in mind. Victory without endgame is just chaos.

strategies.name: Weave Fact and Fiction (Misperception Strategy)
strategies.essence: Control what they believe. Reality is what they perceive.

strategies.name: Take the Line of Least Expectation (Ordinary-Extraordinary Strategy)
strategies.essence: Do what they'd never predict. The obvious move is the vulnerable move.

strategies.name: Occupy the Moral High Ground (Righteous Strategy)
strategies.essence: Make your cause just. Even if it isn't, make it look that way.

strategies.name: Deny Them Targets (Void Strategy)
strategies.essence: Be formless. What they can't hit, they can't hurt.

strategies.name: Seem to Work for Others' Interests (Alliance Strategy)
strategies.essence: Your agenda hidden inside their cause. They fight for you willingly.

strategies.name: Give Them Rope to Hang Themselves (One-Upmanship Strategy)
strategies.essence: Let their arrogance destroy them. Overconfidence precedes the fall.

strategies.name: Take Small Bites (Fait Accompli Strategy)
strategies.essence: Incremental gains avoid triggering response. Done before they notice.

strategies.name: Penetrate Their Minds (Communication Strategy)
strategies.essence: Words as weapons. What they think determines what they do.

strategies.name: Destroy from Within (Inner-Front Strategy)
strategies.essence: Create internal dissent. Organizations collapse from the inside.

strategies.name: Dominate While Seeming to Submit (Passive-Aggression Strategy)
strategies.essence: Surface compliance, hidden defiance. Obey the letter, violate the spirit.

strategies.name: Sow Uncertainty and Panic (Terror Strategy)
strategies.essence: Fear multiplies your power. One dramatic act echoes endlessly.
